line_preview: # Please do not remove any comments from this file, but feel free to add as many
# comments to R code as you like!
# Replace all ---USER INPUT--- sections with relevant input (including the -
# When you are done, save this file as RPCB_Final_Analysis_Study_XX.R, where XX
# "Study 1: Replication of Poliseno et al., 2010 (Nature)", should be
#@ Original Study Title: Coadministration of a Tumor-Penetrating Peptide Enhances the Efficacy of Cancer Drugs
#@ eLife link to Registered Report: https://elifesciences.org/articles/06959
#@ eLife link to Replication Study: https://elifesciences.org/articles/17584
#@ Experiment and Effect Numbers: Experiment 1 (1 Effect)
#source("~/Credentials.R") #for private use during initial R script generation
#In the function download.OSF.file, 'RPCB_private_access' is an object that contains the private viewing link or a private access token
#which is necessary to view and create scripts while this project is private. Upon publication, when the project is made public,
#a private access token or private link will no longer be necessary.
#@ NOTE: Data must be loaded from OSF directly and NOT rely on any local files.
#DOX accumulation in prostate tumor tissue of DOX+PBS vs DOX+iRGD
# Downloads R script file 'Study_15_Dox_Accumulation_analysis.R' of analysis of replication data from https://osf.io/tx4y9/
